title: Doff All Year Lawn Feed Concentrate – 1L Liquid Fertiliser for Fast-Growing Healthy Grass – Seaweed Enriched Lawn Care for New & Established Gardens Year-Round Greener Grass
features: VERSATILE PLANT NUTRITION – Boost the health of your lawn with Doff All Year Lawn Feed Concentrate. Enriched with NPK 7.5-5.1-5, micro-nutrients and seaweed, this fast-acting grass fertiliser promotes healthier, greener lawns in established and new outdoor gardens

BOOST GROWTH & RESILIENCE – Rich in nitrogen, phosphorus, potassium, and slow-release sulphur, this lawn fertiliser strengthens roots and encourages lush green grass. In a watering can, dilute 4 capfuls in 9L of water and apply the grass feed liquid fertiliser evenly when grass is actively growing

EASY-TO-USE FORMULA – This lawn treatment is conveniently supplied with an integral measure for precise dilution every time. Whether nurturing a new or existing garden, Doff’s lawn food saves time and effort, offering professional results with minimal fuss

RELIABLE & EFFECTIVE RESULTS – This high-quality grass feed provides consistent nutrition for vibrant grass year-round. Ideal for lawn patch repair, this 1-litre bottle covers lawns up to 250m² when diluted, offering nutrient-rich feed for healthy growth in large and small lawns

NOURISHING PLANT FEED – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted feeds and straight solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering effective and complete nutritional plant food to help your garden grow
